name: claude-code-kit
description: Self-publishing marketplace for the claude-code-kit's own upgrade, rollback, status, and recipe skills.

plugins.name: claude-code-kit
plugins.description: Upgrade, rollback, status, and recipe skills for claude-code-kit installations. Provides /claude-code-kit:upgrade (intelligent merge over existing ~/.claude/), :rollback (restore specific backup), :status (drift + conflict report), and :fix-notion-mcp-port (workaround for Notion enterprise OAuth allow-list).
